name: DolEx Dollar Express
description_short: DolEx Dollar Express provides check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at their Phoenix location with extended hours.
description_long:
DolEx Dollar Express operates as a check-cashing and financial services provider located at 8050 N 27th Ave in Phoenix, Arizona 85051. The company has been categorized appropriately within the check-cashing services category, offering consumers traditional cash access and payment solutions.

Based on the available information from their Waze listing, DolEx Dollar Express appears to offer core check-cashing services along with complementary financial transaction services. The company maintains a physical storefront location in Phoenix and provides customer support via phone at (800) 481-1946, with an online presence through their website at dolex.com.

The company distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 8:00 PM on weekdays and maintaining weekend hours on both Saturday and Sunday, albeit with a midday closure on weekends. This scheduling accommodates working customers who need access to check-cashing and payment services outside traditional 9-to-5 business hours. The specific service offerings beyond basic check cashing are not detailed in the available source material.

DolEx Dollar Express serves as a straightforward financial services option for consumers needing immediate check conversion to cash or payment processing solutions. However, detailed information regarding fee structures, service limits, identification requirements, and the full scope of available services is not available from the provided website content. Consumers should contact the company directly at their phone number or website for complete service details and pricing information before conducting transactions.
address: 3620 East Thomas Road, N 36th St #104, Phoenix, AZ 85018

company_info.headquarters: 3620 East Thomas Road, N 36th St #104, Phoenix, AZ 85018

pros: Extended weekday hours until 8:00 PM (Monday-Friday) accommodates working customers
Weekend service available on Saturday and Sunday with morning hours starting at 9:00 AM
Direct phone support available at (800) 481-1946 for customer inquiries
Physical storefront location in Phoenix with established address at 8050 N 27th Ave
Online web presence at dolex.com for additional company information
Consistent operating hours with predictable scheduling for repeat customers
Multiple services offered beyond check cashing (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
cons: Limited service information available online; company details not fully transparent on web presence
Midday closure on weekends (14:00-14:30) creates inconvenience for Saturday/Sunday customers
No pricing, fee structure, or service limits disclosed in available company information
Typical check-cashing industry concerns regarding higher fees compared to traditional banking
Website appears to be primarily a directory listing rather than a comprehensive business site
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check-to-cash conversion
Working professionals requiring evening or weekend financial transaction services
Individuals sending domestic or international wire transfers without bank accounts
Customers needing bill payment services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: DolEx Dollar Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Phoenix area who need quick check cashing or money transfer services during extended hours, particularly after standard business hours. The main caveat is that detailed service information, fee structures, and specific service limits are not publicly available, requiring direct contact with the company before conducting transactions.
